programme.desc: Seth is living in the home he grew up.

programme.title: Sell This House!: Amityville, NY
programme.desc: Jean's obsession of baskets has gone out of control. Step into her house

programme.title: Sell This House!: Vashon, WA
programme.desc: Marnie Jones owns an historic church turned bed and breakfast inn on Vashon

programme.title: Alone: The Knife's Edge
programme.desc: After several days, the participants attempt to acclimate to their environment.

programme.title: Alone: The Beasts of Night
programme.desc: After a week on Vancouver Island, several of the participants are finding success.

programme.title: Alone: The Freeze
programme.desc: Temperatures plummet on the island and the remaining contestants are forced to face the onset of winter head on.

programme.title: Alone: Brokedown Palace
programme.desc: Extreme isolation takes its toll on the remaining participants in the wild.

programme.title: Alone: Triumph
programme.desc: Two men remain on Vancouver Island as the storm of the year blows in.

programme.title: Alone: Alone: Making the Cut
programme.desc: Meet the 10 new participants on ALONE season 2 and see what it takes to make the cut. From exhaustive skills tests to camera and safety training.

programme.title: Alone: Once More Unto the Breach
programme.desc: The first day of the adventure begins, with 10 people prepared to head out into unknown wilderness and survive for as long as they can, in total isolation.

programme.title: Alone: The Knife's Edge
programme.desc: After several days, the participants attempt to acclimate to their environment.

programme.title: Alone: The Beasts of Night
programme.desc: After a week on Vancouver Island, several of the participants are finding success.

programme.title: Alone: The Freeze
programme.desc: Temperatures plummet on the island and the remaining contestants are forced to face the onset of winter head on.

programme.title: Alone: Brokedown Palace
programme.desc: Extreme isolation takes its toll on the remaining participants in the wild.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Corryn Conyer, "The 50s Hollywood Glamour Bride"
programme.desc: Harlem bride Corryn Conyer has dreamt of looking like Audrey Hepburn on her wedding day. When David meets Corryn three weeks before her big day, he realizes her wedding was far from a fairytale ending.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Christina Velez, "The West Side Story Bride"
programme.desc: Christina Velez and fiance Ed Rangel were ready to exchange vows on a Mexican beach, but their plans changed following the outbreak of "swine flu."

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Varneka Edwards, "The Golden Bride"
programme.desc: Living in Bear, Delaware is nothing like living in New York City, but that hasn't stopped David Tutera's latest bride, Varneka Edwards, from trying to bring the Big Apple to town on her wedding day.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Great Gatsby Bride
programme.desc: David Tutera meets a bride who wants a 1920's inspired wedding, and yet she doesn't have any reception space and she's three weeks away from the big day! Can David, wedding planner to the stars, pull off a Great Gatsby event to remember?

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Spring Bride
programme.desc: David Tutera meets a bride that has lists for her lists and then more lists. While she wants a springtime wedding, if she continues to resist letting go and handing over the steering wheel to David, we might see this bride left out in the cold.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Poker Bride
programme.desc: Meet a bride that loves all things Vegas, and plans on wearing a light up dice garter. Will David Tutera be able to convert NJ to the best of Las Vegas in less than three short weeks?

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Zen Bride
programme.desc: Planning a wedding usually involves some chaos, even for David Tutera. But he's about to meet a bride whose zen themed wedding has her so calm, David has to pull out all the stops to get her out of her comfort zone.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Swamp Bride
programme.desc: What is David Tutera to do with a bride who's dream wedding theme is "swamp?" This is a first for David, and with only three weeks until the wedding, he's either going to sink or swim.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Diva Bride
programme.desc: They say everything is bigger in Texas, and so is the personality of David's new Dallas bride. When she says "diva," you better say 'licious," because she's a force to be reckoned with both her temperament and her posse are fierce.

programme.title: My Fair Wedding: Cowgirl Bride
programme.desc: With many brides, the dress is the most important thing for her wedding. But with David Tutera's next bride -- it's all about the cowboy boots. This Texas cowgirl is dead set on two stepping her way off into the sunset.

programme.title: House of Curves: Who'S The B In The Skinny Jeans
programme.desc: Egos flare when Kenyatta hires a new Bella Rene team member. Kendra and Kelli rumble at the spring lookbook photo shoot and Kenyatta reveals her high-fashion line.

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: The Phony Photographer
programme.desc: Kal, a spirits entrepreneur, goes undercover as a struggling photographer. While trying to impress his dates, he fumbles his cover story, even forgets to take off the lens cap. Will the women reject his ruse?

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: Doggy Style
programme.desc: Mandy, a dairy heiress and socialite, goes undercover as a dog walker. A terrible liar, she can't keep her story straight at her job or apartment, raising the suspicions of the funny marketing exec she meets.

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: The Art Of Deception
programme.desc: Vito, a marketing and advertising mogul, goes undercover as a struggling artist. But when he's too successful at playing the directionless creative type, will it scare away the ambitious woman he falls for?

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: The Lonely Surfer
programme.desc: Ethan, a software CEO, goes undercover as a surf instructor. He makes his date suspicious when he forgets where he lives, and surfs terribly. How will she respond when he reveals that it's all been a lie?

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: Fitness Mogul Strips Down
programme.desc: Greg, an international fitness model, goes undercover as a landscaper. Greg falls hard for a blind date, but his friends spot a jealous streak. The questions really begin when she sees him shirtless at work...

programme.title: Mystery Millionaire: Tip Your Bartender With Xo
programme.desc: Mick, the young president of his family's candle empire, goes undercover as a bartender. After three high-energy blind dates, he meets a girl who lights his fire - and does he really propose??

programme.title: Swimsuit Secrets Revealed: Swimsuit Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: A fashion expert gives us a look at the latest bathing suit trends, both dos & don'ts, resulting in makeovers for a few beachgoers.

programme.title: Love Blows: Annie'S Secret
programme.desc: Annie is enraged to find her mom called her ex-boyfriend. Nikki steals Annie's client - Chicago's Most Eligible Bachelor. Lisa calls Patti Stanger (Million Dollar Matchmaker) for help.

programme.title: Love Blows: Patti Goes Nuclear
programme.desc: Patti Stanger (Million Dollar Matchmaker) grills the LuvBiz team and explodes on the recruiters. Jim and Lisa face their toughest client. Nikki gets wasted. Jim fears Annie's idea may backfire.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 5 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''5 Chefs Compete'' - Using discarded everyday objects, a rock band treats the contestants to a musical number. The chefs are then given thirty minutes to make restaurant-ready dishes from leftovers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 4 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''4 Chefs Compete'' - The remaining chefs participate in the "taste it, now make it" challenge. The winner dines out with guests the losers move furniture and prep the kitchen for dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - Winner Chosen
programme.desc: ''Winner Chosen'' - The final two chefs attend an L.A. night club to compete in their final challenge: prepare two appetizers and three entrées in one hour. Five iconic chefs will judge the dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 18 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''18 Chefs Compete'' - The new contestants form two teams and make their signature dishes for Chef Ramsay. A large audience looks on at the Cinerama Dome theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 17 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''17 Chefs Compete'' - This episode's challenge? Re-create Chef Ramsay's geoduck sashimi. The team that prepares fifteen perfect dishes gets a pool break while the losing team makes dinner for everyone.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 16 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''16 Chefs Compete'' - In a challenge to improve communication skills, Chef Ramsay gives each contestant a jacket with a recipe printed on the back, which they need to rely on their teammates to read.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 15 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''15 Chefs Compete'' - The teams serve brunch to a class of graduating culinary students. The winners fly to San Francisco to dine at Atelier Crenn the losers grind and stuff chorizo sausages.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 14 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''14 Chefs Compete'' - The chefs must identify mystery proteins and match them to dishes. The winners meet Olympic gold medalists at the Annenberg Community Beach House.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 13 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''13 Chefs Compete'' - The contestants split into pairs and capture animals. The chefs have to prepare a side to go with the protein that they just caught.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen - 12 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: ''12 Chefs Compete'' - The teams create six Italian opera-inspired dishes. The winners go on a shopping spree at American Rag Cie, while the losers break down squid for a squid-ink tortellini dish.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Revisited: Gordon Returns - Revisited: Gordon Returns
programme.desc: When Chef Ramsay returns to Finn McCool's, The Olde Stone Mill, The Mixing Bowl, Dillon's, Campania's and Peter's, he finds restaurants saved from the brink of disaster.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Café 36 - Café 36
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay drops by Café 36, a French-American eatery in Illinois. The couple who own the place are lacking in business skills and need Ramsay's expertise to teach them how to draw in a crowd.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Cafe Hon - Cafe Hon
programme.desc: When a quaint Baltimore café suffers a public image ordeal, Chef Ramsay stops in for some damage control.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Flamango's - Flamango's
programme.desc: While in New Jersey, Chef Ramsay visits Flamango's, an outdated eatery in need of help. Ramsay suggests a major overhaul, but the owner thinks it's best to simply shut down the restaurant.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Chappy's - Chappy's
programme.desc: The owners of Chappy’s, a Cajun-style restaurant, had to move in the wake of Hurricane Katrina. Now in Nashville, they’re struggling to find a loyal base of customers.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Kingston Cafe - Kingston Cafe
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay makes a trip to Pasadena, California to whip an eatery specializing in Caribbean cuisine into shape.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Mojito's - Mojito's
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visits Mojito's, a Cuban eatery in Brooklyn. The owners purchased the restaurant as newlyweds, but they are now seven years into a crumbling marriage and business.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Fleming - Fleming
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visits Fleming, a Danish eatery in Miami. The stubborn owner doesn't want to update the place and Ramsay discovers something in the cooler that leads him to close the restaurant.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Lela's - Lela's
programme.desc: Lela's is an upscale restaurant in desperate need of clientele. When Chef Ramsay starts criticizing the menu, the executive chef sees red, leading to a showdown in front of the staff.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Hannah and Mason's - Hannah and Mason's
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visits French bistro Hannah and Mason's. Owned by two friends who lack business skills and motivation, the restaurant administers bounced checks to the staff.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Le Bistro - Le Bistro
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay drops by a French eatery and discovers that he and the head chef have similar culinary training. However, the chef is in denial about the poor quality of his restaurant's food.

programme.title: Bodkin House
programme.desc: Award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi heads to the two-star, 11-bedroom Bodkin House Hotel in the Gloucester countryside. With meagre profits and a couple reluctant to change, it looks like the country road is going to prove a bumpy ride.

programme.title: BONNINGTON BEACH
programme.desc: Award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi heads to Bonnington Beach Hotel in Bournemouth. Faced with an owner reluctant to change and a budget business heading for a crash landing, Alex has anything but a smooth flight ahead...

programme.title: TIERS CROSS, WEST WALES
programme.desc: This week the dragon’s den awaits the Hotel Inspector in Tiers Cross, West Wales. The Welcome Traveller Inn, run by former Newport fish and chip shop owners the Partridge family.

programme.title: Milton Lodge
programme.desc: Back for an eighth series, award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi faces up to one of her biggest challenges yet in the shape of an eccentric 79-year-old, Terry Connor, owner of The Milton Lodge. Can Alex turn the hotel’s insecure future around?

programme.title: Worlington
programme.desc: Sisters Joy and Sharon bought a delightful hotel that turned into a money pit, eating into their savings and time. Ruth helped revive their fortunes but, when she returns, will they have gone strength to strength or given up?

programme.title: The Lenchford Inn
programme.desc: This week, Alex heads to an attractive pub hotel on the banks of the River Severn in Worcestershire. The views may be picturesque but this establishment is far from tranquil. The Lenchford Inn is managed by two couples on the brink of a breakdown. Dave and Marie, along with her brother Ian and his wife Wendy, bought the inn thinking it would be a ticket to early retirement. But the combination of four floods in two years and the owners’ inexperience has left their hopes in tatters. The nine bedrooms and 80-seat restaurant are as empty as their bank accounts and, with a ten-year age difference between the two couples, they cannot see eye-to-eye on anything.

programme.title: RUGBY
programme.desc: Twenty-eight year old entrepreneur Raman Bal believed the twenty-five bedroomed Grosvenor Hotel would provide the building block for his new business empire. But £600,000 later and his dream of world domination is crumbling.

programme.title: Tasburgh
programme.desc: Ruth Watson travels to Bath to meet Sue, the owner of an award-winning hotel that has everything but guests. Sue’s running out of money fast but can Ruth rescue her hotel in time? And how will she handle Ruth’s no-nonsense approach?

programme.title: Crown Inn
programme.desc: Award-winning hotelier Alex Polizzi meets the 57-year-old owner of The Crown Inn, a Peak District hotel that’s going downhill fast... Can Alex act as both peacemaker as well as pathfinder to discover a way out of the financial disaster?

programme.title: Woodlands Lodge Hotel
programme.desc: Young couple Rob & Elly bought the Haven with a dream of turning it into Great Yarmouth’s first 5 star guest house, but their dream has turned into a nightmare. After just three months in business they’d built up massive debts and had no guests, so they turned to Ruth Watson. She took them back to school, including a trip to her own award winning hotel, but could she get ambitious Elly to be realistic?

programme.title: Project Runway - An Unconventional Launch Party
programme.desc: "An Unconventional Launch Party" - Kicking off the season with an Unconventional Materials Challenge, Heidi and Tim welcome the designers at a Season 15 launch party. The designers are shocked to learn that the decor for the party will also serve as their materials for their looks. Savannah Guthrie joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway - Just Fabulous!
programme.desc: "Just Fabulous!" - The designers must create an outfit to flatter all body types, and the challenge proves to be more difficult for some than others. Guest judge Nina Dobrev joins.

programme.title: Project Runway - Blacklight or Daylight?
programme.desc: "Blacklight or Daylight?" - The designers have to create a look that sparkles not only in daylight, but also under blacklights on the Runway. Anxieties rise when the unusual materials leave many of the designers in the dark. Jamie King joins the judges this week.

programme.title: Project Runway - Sink or Swim
programme.desc: "Sink or Swim" - In the Heidi Klum Swimwear Challenge, the designers create their own fabric to use in crafting a stylish swimsuit. The winner will have their design sold as part of Heidi's swimwear line! But the contestants lack of swimsuit experience makes for a harder challenge than expected.

programme.title: Project Runway - There's No "I" in "Team"
programme.desc: "There's No "I" in "Team"" - In the season's first Team Challenge, the designers exercise their business savvy when they pitch their collection ideas to raise money from a group of mystery investors. The stakes are raised when they learn that the winning team members will each receive $5,000, and the winner will be featured in Marie Claire magazine!

programme.title: Project Runway - There IS Crying in Fashion
programme.desc: "There IS Crying in Fashion" - The designers are excited to attend a press event, but their festive mood is quickly spoiled when the party turns out to be a challenge. The misdirect proves to be more than most of the designers can handle, as many of them have to start their looks over completely when criticized by a disappointed Tim Gunn. Emily Ratajkowski joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway - Welcome to the Urban Jungle
programme.desc: "Welcome to the Urban Jungle" - The exhausted designers are whisked away to Universal Studios Orlando to recharge their batteries with a roller coaster or two. They are then challenged to find inspiration from their experience at the theme park to design a look for the “Urban Jungle.” Guest judge Rebecca Minkoff joins.

programme.title: Project Runway - Project Pop-Up
programme.desc: "Project Pop-Up " - The designers are faced with their second Team Challenge of the season and must work together to create 3-piece collections to be shown in a SoHo pop-up shop. However, working in teams leads to tensions and tantrums as the designers struggle to have their voices heard. Guest judge Kelly Osbourne returns.

programme.title: Project Runway - Life is Full of Surprises
programme.desc: "Life is Full of Surprises" - The designers are pleasantly surprised when each one of them gets a special guest from home. But the emotional reunions with their mothers, daughters, and friends are quickly overshadowed by the drama of the next challenge when the designers learn that their newly arrived loved ones will also be their clients—and there is $50,000 on the line! Olivia Culpo and Katia Beauchamp join the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway - A Power Trip
programme.desc: "A Power Trip" - The designers take a majestic helicopter ride high above NYC for inspiration for their next challenge: to create an editorial, high fashion look for Marie Claire magazine. Guest judges Anne Fulenwider and Camilla Belle join the panel.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Heavy Hitters
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Ruffians and Wrestlers
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Everybody Just a Child?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Matt & Froy Auto Recovery
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: We Weren't Informed
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Lyndah's Revenge
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior. Finally, the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck, but at what cost does revenge come?

programme.title: El Prisionero
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: Ex on The Beach
programme.desc: Ten smoking-hot celebrity singles think they are running away to a tropical island for a once-in-a-lifetime romantic vacation of fun and sun. But just as the party is getting starting, some unwanted guests arrive to break up their good time.

programme.title: Ex on The Beach
programme.desc: Ten smoking-hot celebrity singles think they are running away to a tropical island for a once-in-a-lifetime romantic vacation of fun and sun. But just as the party is getting starting, some unwanted guests arrive to break up their good time.

programme.desc: The Challenge is a reality competition battle across a series of contests for the chance to win money. Contestants endure brutal challenges, devastating elimination rounds, steamy hookups and bitter rivalries.

programme.desc: Love & Hip-Hop Hollywood follows music business newcomers and veterans like Kimberly, Moniece Slaughter, Fizz, Lyrica, A1, La'Britney, Ray J and Apple Watts as they put it all on the line for a taste of industry success.

programme.desc: What would you do if the love of your life were a serial killer? A crime novel writer Han Jane has become a nuisance to her neighbors by often mistaking her neighbors as suspects of crime. One day, she hears someone’s scream from upstairs and decides that the person upstairs is the serial killer on loose. While Jane keeps pursuing the serial killer with help of Jason and her childhood friend, she witnesses a shocking scene that changes everything she had believed so far.

programme.title: The Throne (HELLBOUND's Yoo Ah-In & PARASITE's Song Kang-Ho)
programme.desc: In the year of 1762, when King Yeong Jo of the Joseon dynasty's been ruling for 35 years already, Crown prince Sa Do is accused of plotting treason by his biological mother lady Yi. King Yeong Jo falls into a dilemma since he could not penalize his own son as a traitor as it would mean that he would become the father of a traitor threatening his throne, and ends up ordering Sa Do to take his own life. As Sa Do’s lieges oppose King Yeong Jo’s decision by putting their own lives at risk, King Yeong Jo locks Sa Do in a wooden rice chest to kill him.

programme.title: I'M LIVE: S1 E234
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is risking city-pop songwriter nokdu! nokdu made his big debut in 2018 with the single "Say My Name." As a graduate of The Liverpool Institute for Performing Arts, founded by Paul McCartney and Mark Featherstone-Witty, he covers a wide range of genres in his music, ranging from Brit-pop to punk to R&B. Backed up by his academic background, he boasts his outstanding ability not only as a songwriter but also a lyricist, producer, and singer. Also known for his stage manners, he is quickly capturing the ears and souls of countless listeners. Currently, he's taking part in the competition program "Super Band 2." His fantastic performance in the show definitely makes us anticipate his future as a musician. In this episode, nokdu performs "Stay With Me," "Wona," and more to show off the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE: S1 E237
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of the Christmas Special, the Year-End Special, and the New-Year Special, and the guest of the Year-End Special Episode is Kwon Jin ah. Kwon Jin ah is known for her tranquil and heartwarming voice that genuinely comforts our hearts. In February this year, she released her first self-produced EP, “The Way For Us,” and showed off her capabilities as a songwriter and producer as well. In this episode, Kwon Jin ah performs “KNOCK,” “This Winter,” and her solo version of “Hello Antenna, Hello Christmas,” the carol jointly released by musicians on the record label Antenna. Also famous for her live singing skills and ticket-selling power, this artist is bound to melt our souls during this cold winter season. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene, including Jannabi, 10CM, HYUKOH, SE SO NEON, CNBLUE, Jeongmilla, BIBI, NIve, and Lydia Lee, have participated in the show. Also, only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.title: After School Club: S1 E533 - MCND
programme.desc: The Fun and Dynamic group MCND! MCND is back with ‘#MOOD’, the song about the MZ generation’s story. And they are coming to ASC. Far apart, but together in heart! We’ve got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don’t hesitate!

programme.title: The Female Friend Among Guys 2
programme.desc: Ji-hye was sprinting and bumps into Ho-tae and breaks his phone. Ho-tae demands Ji-hye to pay him for repair expenses, but Ji-hye, who was in dire need for a bathroom, unintentionally ends up running away from Ho-tae, and arrives at a bathroom with no toilet paper. Ji-hye averts the crisis with toilet paper given to her by Seok-ju, who she has never met before, and she ends up selling her laptop to Jin-hee to pay for Ho-tae’s screen repair costs, but ends up losing the money she got from selling her laptop. This group ends up becoming best friends with one another through a random incident… From high school to marriage, who will Ji-hye end up marrying among them?

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In the tiny, rural town of Carthage, TX, assistant funeral director Bernie Tiede was one of the town's most beloved residents. He taught Sunday school, sang in the church choir and was always willing to lend a helping hand. Everyone loved and appreciated Bernie, so it came as no surprise when he befriended Marjorie Nugent, an affluent widow who was as well known for her sour attitude as her fortune. Bernie frequently traveled with Marjorie and even managed her banking affairs. Marjorie quickly became fully dependent on Bernie and his generosity and Bernie struggled to meet her increasing demands. Bernie continued to handle her affairs, and the townspeople went months without seeing Marjorie. The people of Carthage were shocked when it was reported that Marjorie Nugent had been dead for some time, and Bernie Tiede was being charged with the murder.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show - The Return of Edwin Carp
programme.desc: ''The Return of Edwin Carp'' - Rob attempts to coax a legendary radio star out of retirement for a TV special.

programme.title: That Girl - It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 2)
programme.desc: "It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 2)" - Donald is on the edge over Ann's time with Noel Prince, despite her assurances she has no interest in her new boss.

programme.title: That Girl - Twas the Night Before Christmas, You're Under Arrest
programme.desc: "Twas the Night Before Christmas, You're Under Arrest" - Ann buys theater tickets from a scalper as a Christmas present for the Baumans, but she later learns from Don that some scalpers use personal information to burglarize their customers.

programme.title: That Girl - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: "A Friend in Need" - After Ann is injured on a movie set, Donald goes overboard in trying to take care of her.

programme.title: That Girl - Fur All We Know
programme.desc: "Fur All We Know" - After Ann models an expensive chinchilla stole, the owner insists that she borrow it as she accompanies Don to a party for the wealthy jet set where she is mistaken for an heiress.

programme.title: That Girl - The Rivals
programme.desc: "The Rivals" - Another family visit to Ann's parents in Brewster pits Donald against Lou.

programme.title: That Girl - Sixty-Five on the Aisle
programme.desc: "Sixty-Five on the Aisle" - Lou Marie buys theater and train tickets for sixty-five people from Brewster to see Ann in a play. A conflict arises between the producers who do not want them leaving the theater during a scene.

programme.title: That Girl - Call of the Wild
programme.desc: "Call of the Wild" - A commercial director tells Anne she has a face that no housewife would feel threatened by, which makes her wonder if she has any sex appeal.

programme.title: That Girl - The Other Woman
programme.desc: "The Other Woman" - Ann suggests that her father escort Ethel Merman to a formal event, and the tabloids make him look like her new boyfriend.

programme.title: That Girl - He and She and He
programme.desc: "He and She and He" - Still obsessed with Ann, Noel Prince returns to New York to try to get her to marry him.

programme.title: That Girl - Odpdypahimcaifss
programme.desc: "Odpdypahimcaifss" - A scandal erupts when Donald's mother is invited to Ann's place and finds his pants in her closet.

programme.title: That Girl - Great Guy
programme.desc: "Great Guy" - Ann is worried about Pete's new boyfriend George (Albert Salmi), a jock who doesn't necessarily treat her like a lady.

programme.title: That Girl - The Detective Story
programme.desc: "The Detective Story" - A series of obscene phone calls prompts Ann to call the NYPD, who sends over a detective who seems to be getting a little too close for comfort, especially Donald's.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Nazareth - American by Choice
programme.desc: Award Winning Comedian Nazareth, has been seen by over 40 Million people around the world through live concerts, TV and Radio broadcasts. His list of TV appearances include: Comedy Central, ABC Family, NBC, CBS, and TBN.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Mike Toomey - Welcome to My World
programme.desc: With his Sharp Delivery, quick wit, and unique style, Mike Toomey has been a favorite at comedy clubs and special events since 1982. A Daily performer on The WGN Morning News in Chicago, Mike has appeared in concert with such names as George Carlin, Wayne Newton, Crosby, Stills & Nash, and Reba McIntyre. He has performed on numerous television programs including HBO's U.S. Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen Colorado MTV's Half Hour Comedy Hour and A&E's Comedy on the Road. The Chicago Tribune calls Mike, "One of the funniest and most talented performers to ever work in Chicago." For an evening of uncontrollable laughs, Mike Toomey is a sure choice!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Johnny Beehner - The Flamingo Special
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he’s likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago’s prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Cam Bertrand - Sophisticated Ignorance
programme.desc: Cam shares his outlook on relationships and life through the eyes of a 23-year-old in a way that everyone can relate to. Bringing high energy and witty style that appeals to a wide demographic.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Andrew Sleighter - Breakfast Stealer
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Cleto Rodriguez - Cleto is My Real Name
programme.desc: Rodriguez connects with audiences by relating everyday life experiences. Anything and everything is fair game, from marriage mishaps to the challenges of dieting. His comedy is high-energy, observational and hilarious with a brilliant Latino twist.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Robert Mac - Back to Lake Titicaca
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Eric O Shea - Life: It's Not Your Fault
programme.desc: Eric O'Shea has been active in the comedy business for 25 years. He has performed in L.A. with Betty White at the Creative Emmy Awards and has appeared on America's Got Talent TV Show. Every year since 1997, Eric has performed an average of 70 shows a year, and has received 7 nominations as the “National College Comedian of the Year”

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Dave Nihill - Documented
programme.desc: Dave is the winner of the prestigious 43rd annual San Francisco Comedy Competition, and runner up in the Moth’s largest US Grandslam storytelling competition.

programme.title: Alex Velluto - Spurious
programme.desc: Like Rocky Balboa, Alex Velluto is the son of an Italian immigrant and brings the same intensity, will, and drive to the comedy stage. In 2016, Alex was voted 'Best Comedian' by City Weekly Magazine and is the winner of the Finger Lakes Comedy Festival in Ithaca, NY. Alex is a regular at Wiseguys Comedy Club where he has headlined and worked with some of the biggest names in comedy. He has also “gone the distance” in many competitions and festivals across the country. Alex was a finalist in the the Funniest Person in Utah competition, and The Salt Lake Comedy Festival stand up competition, has performed at the Idaho Laugh Festival, and Finger Lakes Comedy Festival. In addition to his stand-up comedy, Alex is a co-host of the "Happy Valley Podcast", and is renowned for referring to himself in the third person, and is an excellent writer of comedy bios about himself that everybody likes.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Orlando Baxter - Glorified Baby Sitter
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Rodney Laney - Who is Rodney Laney?
programme.desc: Rodney Laney has completed pilots for Comedy Central, MTV, and A&E. He has been seen on HBO, FOX News Channel’s Red Eye, The Late Late Show on CBS, Comedy Central’s Premium Blend, comedy.tv on the HD channel, two appearances on Gotham Comedy Live AXSTV, and Live in Gotham VR. He has appeared at the prestigious Just for Laughs Comedy Festival Montreal and LOL Lounge TBS Presents A Very Funny Festival: Just for Laughs Chicago.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Maher Matta - Personally Speaking
programme.desc: Born in Lebanon and raised in the American South, Maher Matta jokes about flying while Arab, using Rogaine at fifteen, and working as a state trooper.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Heather Mabbott: I Didn't Mean To Say That
programme.desc: Her quick wit and unique style has dazzled audiences all over the country. Heather is a clean comedian and has performed with some of the best, like Caroline Rhea, Jimmy Walker, Bobcat Goldthwait, Bruce Baum, Sinbad, and many, many more.

programme.title: Danny Bhoy: Subject to Change
programme.desc: Recorded live in Montreal, this is the much-awaited North American debut of Scottish comedy sensation Danny Bhoy.

programme.title: Chris Gethard: Half My Life
programme.desc: Chris Gethard delivers his blend of hard-hitting stand up & storytelling at small venues across the country at the end of 2019.

programme.title: Paul Rodriguez: The Here and Wow
programme.desc: Veteran comedian, Paul Rodriguez hits the stage to give you his perspectives on life.

programme.title: Jeff Garcia: Livin' The Dream
programme.desc: Famed Latino comedian and voiceover artist, Jeff Garcia, comes to you from San Manuel Indian Bingo and Casino with his signature improv style.

programme.title: Jeff Garcia: The Ten Dollar Ticket
programme.desc: Latino comic Jeff Garcia aims to give you your money's worth with his signature original shows in this special from 2008.

programme.title: Jeff Garcia: Low Budget Madness
programme.desc: Jeff Garcia's Low Budget Madness is packed with hilarious sketches that will leave you in stitches.

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Scared to Death
programme.desc: Hot-headed novelist and former police detective, Ted Lonergan is the only man who can stop the monster in the Los Angeles sewer. Despite his girlfriend’s life being at stake , Lonergan is as useful as if he’d never been brought in on the case! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mary Jo and Bridget from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Setting Up a Room
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the best way to set up a room. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Setting Up a Room!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Retro Puppet Master
programme.desc: Oh hai! The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this direct-to-video prequel to the C-list 90s horror movie franchise starring The Rooms Greg Sestero! Join Mike, Kevin, Chris R, and Bill for Retro Puppet Master.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Coffeehouse Rendezvous

programme.title: RiffTrax: Future Force
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this David Carradine action classic about a bounty hunter who must protect a woman reporter from a gang of renegade cops. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Future Force!

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Story of a Teenage Drug Addict

programme.title: RIFFTRAX - Final Justice
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to the classic film that put the “chubby Deputy Sheriff from Texas goes on an adventure in Malta” genre on the map! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Final Justice!

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Making Sense with Sentences

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Fear

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School - Episode 201
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro - in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way - they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go "back to school" to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much "fish out of water" at the academy, even with the "cool kids" - Robin and Ava - showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as "library helpers" much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book...isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting The Message - Episode 11
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? More twisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! The Friends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into a frantic race against time when Emma discovers that her innocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- a text that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma's undying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma's BFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angry brute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good? - Episode 202
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. "Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure" says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as "general manager" of "castle operations," much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm - AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge "Gold is Good" ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything...including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live...poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents - Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond -think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a "spa holiday" with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into...Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says "No deal." "We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents." It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers. With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship 'The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become 'The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession - Episode 203
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the "Knight-a-Kon" in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever "infiltration" mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the "Minitrex" - a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for "Best Costume." The prize: "Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1." The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just...about...to get the book when...the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! "Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1" is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy...she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective - Episode 13
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show - in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day - Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty - the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament - Episode 204
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights - the Tighty Knighties - are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks "How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero." But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament - she's agreed to be in "princess mode" for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille - Episode 14
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls - until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef - Episode 205
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his "Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition" cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. "Hot chili makes hot monsters!" Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands - meaning Jestro's - could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. "Nope, not hot enough...waaaay too much garlic....you call that hot?!" (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address - Episode 15
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong - especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing ("Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?"), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Knight Out - Episode 206
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then...more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort "Exalted Towers" renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the "high class" resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are "off" at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see...Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters - though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Dive In - Episode 16
programme.desc: Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends - until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. The Friends each try to help, with disastrous results. Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends - until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. He's Tad, the new lifeguard, and just the sight of him reduces the normally fearless Andrea to a babbling wimp. The Friends all try to help her out, with less-than stellar results, each attempt resulting in increasing mayhem for Tad until he's terrified of Andrea. Then Andrea discovers that she's been mooning over the wrong boy all along!

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to 'turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to 'turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever - Episode 207
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of "snotty" monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham - one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a "snotheiser" ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters ... some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath...he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two...it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power "Glorious Griffon" but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: I Told You So - Episode 17
programme.desc: Confined to a wheelchair after a failed Halloween attempt to prove herself a reporter, What's At Heart photographer Emma sees strange goings-on through her hospital window. She's convinced the neighbors are jewel thieves, but no one believes her - till the bad guys come after her! To show her Friends on the What's At Heart school paper that she's more than just a photographer, Emma investigates a scary old house on Halloween eve -- only to take a tumble and land in the hospital. There, confined to a wheelchair, she observes mysterious goings-on through her window which convince her that the neighbors are jewel thieves. Her friends, though dubious, agree to check it out. But after nearly getting caught by the neighbors, they come up empty and decide it's all just Emma's imagination. Meanwhile, up in Maternity, Sophie's having a baby! The girls run out, leaving Emma alone. And that's when the bad guys decide to pay Emma a visit...

programme.title: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon. In his most villainous attempt at using the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates a vortex through space and time to return to the moment Wu first arrives to recruit Kai to become a ninja (Episode 1, 2011) in order to rid the ninja from the future. The Ninja follow him back in time, only to make the mistake in saving Nya from the Skeletons. Suddenly, Past Kai doesn't have a need to become a ninja, so our current day heroes must fix the past to save their futures. The stakes rise as Garmadon catches wind the Ninja have followed him back in time and plans a dangerous trap. In a final battle, the ninja use the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon, causing all of the legendary weapons to shoot off into the night sky. In the end, our heroes return back to the present and learn the Mega-Weapon has ceased to exist because it was destroyed in the past, leaving them all without their elemental powers.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight - Episode 208
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton - the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear...laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, "my monster is so fat" jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as "bouncers" to keep too many people out of the comedy club. ("Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.") The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And...Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad...he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him...go on stage alone, be funny...he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a "joke book" that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny - by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: "Where's my Jestro?!" Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with...the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: TurboZaurs

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't!

programme.title: One Stormy Night
programme.desc: We follow the journeys and explorations of May, a spirited young goat, and Gabu, a wolf who is also May's courageous best friend. Each episode tells how May and Gabu try to have adventurous fun, while hiding their companionship from their respective tribes at the same time.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Doby & Disy
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Sophie la Girafe
programme.desc: Sophie la Girafe invites little ones to learn about colors, numbers, shapes, seasons, baby animals, instruments and fruits through games and songs along with nursery rhymes in her tender, colorful and poetic universe.
